metadata.title: Hide Sidebars on Window Resize
metadata.description: Automatically hides the sidebars when your window is resized to be narrower

regex.target: text: "在窗口调整大小时隐藏侧边栏"

regex.source: .setName("Hide the left sidebar when the window is this narrow")
regex.target: .setName("当窗口这么窄时，隐藏左侧边栏")

regex.source: .setName("Hide the right sidebar when the window is this narrow")
regex.target: .setName("当窗口这么窄时，隐藏右侧边栏")

regex.source: .setName("Show sidebars back when window becomes wide again")
regex.target: .setName("当窗口再次变宽时显示侧边栏")

regex.source: .setDesc("Sidebars remain hidden if option is disabled")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果禁用该选项，侧边栏将保持隐藏。")
